title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Navin's

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Navin's
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navin's. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Business Development Manager to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Navin's:
Navin's is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navin's!
